### MatrixDeterminant { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant(matrix=None)
```

Compute the determinant of the given matrix

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant.i_matrix) | Input socket: Matrix |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant.node) |  |
| [o_determinant](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant.o_determinant) | Output socket: Determinant |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MatrixDeterminant.type) |  |

### Mix { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Mix(
    factor_float=0.5,
    factor_vector=None,
    a_float=0.0,
    b_float=0.0,
    a_vector=None,
    b_vector=None,
    a_color=None,
    b_color=None,
    a_rotation=None,
    b_rotation=None,
    *,
    data_type='FLOAT',
    factor_mode='UNIFORM',
    blend_type='MIX',
    clamp_factor=False,
    clamp_result=False,
)
```

Mix values by a factor

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [blend_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.blend_type) |  |
| [clamp_factor](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.clamp_factor) |  |
| [clamp_result](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.clamp_result) |  |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.data_type) |  |
| [factor_mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.factor_mode) |  |
| [i_a_color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_a_color) | Input socket: A |
| [i_a_float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_a_float) | Input socket: A |
| [i_a_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_a_rotation) | Input socket: A |
| [i_a_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_a_vector) | Input socket: A |
| [i_b_color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_b_color) | Input socket: B |
| [i_b_float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_b_float) | Input socket: B |
| [i_b_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_b_rotation) | Input socket: B |
| [i_b_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_b_vector) | Input socket: B |
| [i_factor_float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_factor_float) | Input socket: Factor |
| [i_factor_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.i_factor_vector) | Input socket: Factor |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.node) |  |
| [o_result_color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.o_result_color) | Output socket: Result |
| [o_result_float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.o_result_float) | Output socket: Result |
| [o_result_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.o_result_rotation) | Output socket: Result |
| [o_result_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.o_result_vector) | Output socket: Result |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.color) | Create Mix with operation 'Color'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.float) | Create Mix with operation 'Float'. |
| [rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.rotation) | Create Mix with operation 'Rotation'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.vector) | Create Mix with operation 'Vector'. |

##### color { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.color }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.color(factor=0.5, a_color=None, b_color=None)
```

Create Mix with operation 'Color'.

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.float(factor=0.5, a=0.0, b=0.0)
```

Create Mix with operation 'Float'.

##### rotation { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.rotation }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.rotation(
    factor=0.5,
    a_rotation=None,
    b_rotation=None,
)
```

Create Mix with operation 'Rotation'.

##### vector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.vector }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Mix.vector(factor=0.5, a=None, b=None)
```

Create Mix with operation 'Vector'.

### MultiplyMatrices { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices(matrix=None, matrix_001=None)
```

Perform a matrix multiplication on two input matrices

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.i_matrix) | Input socket: Matrix |
| [i_matrix_001](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.i_matrix_001) | Input socket: Matrix |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.node) |  |
| [o_matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.o_matrix) | Output socket: Matrix |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.MultiplyMatrices.type) |  |

### PackUVIslands { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands(
    uv=None,
    selection=True,
    margin=0.001,
    rotate=True,
    method='Bounding Box',
)
```

Scale islands of a UV map and move them so they fill the UV space as much as possible

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_margin](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.i_margin) | Input socket: Margin |
| [i_method](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.i_method) | Input socket: Method |
| [i_rotate](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.i_rotate) | Input socket: Rotate |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [i_uv](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.i_uv) | Input socket: UV |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.node) |  |
| [o_uv](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.o_uv) | Output socket: UV |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.PackUVIslands.type) |  |

### ProjectPoint { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint(vector=None, transform=None)
```

Project a point using a matrix, using location, rotation, scale, and perspective divide

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_transform](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.i_transform) | Input socket: Transform |
| [i_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.i_vector) | Input socket: Vector |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.node) |  |
| [o_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.o_vector) | Output socket: Vector |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ProjectPoint.type) |  |

### QuaternionToRotation { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation(w=1.0, x=0.0, y=0.0, z=0.0)
```

Build a rotation from quaternion components

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_w](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.i_w) | Input socket: W |
| [i_x](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.i_x) | Input socket: X |
| [i_y](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.i_y) | Input socket: Y |
| [i_z](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.i_z) | Input socket: Z |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.node) |  |
| [o_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.o_rotation) | Output socket: Rotation |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.QuaternionToRotation.type) |  |

### RandomValue { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue(
    min=None,
    max=None,
    min_001=0.0,
    max_001=1.0,
    min_002=0,
    max_002=100,
    probability=0.5,
    id=0,
    seed=0,
    *,
    data_type='FLOAT',
)
```

Output a randomized value

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.data_type) |  |
| [i_id](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_id) | Input socket: ID |
| [i_max](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_max) | Input socket: Max |
| [i_max_001](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_max_001) | Input socket: Max |
| [i_max_002](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_max_002) | Input socket: Max |
| [i_min](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_min) | Input socket: Min |
| [i_min_001](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_min_001) | Input socket: Min |
| [i_min_002](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_min_002) | Input socket: Min |
| [i_probability](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_probability) | Input socket: Probability |
| [i_seed](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.i_seed) | Input socket: Seed |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.node) |  |
| [o_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.o_value) | Output socket: Value |
| [o_value_001](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.o_value_001) | Output socket: Value |
| [o_value_002](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.o_value_002) | Output socket: Value |
| [o_value_003](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.o_value_003) | Output socket: Value |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [boolean](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.boolean) | Create Random Value with operation 'Boolean'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.float) | Create Random Value with operation 'Float'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.integer) | Create Random Value with operation 'Integer'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.vector) | Create Random Value with operation 'Vector'. |

##### boolean { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.boolean }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.boolean(probability=0.5, id=0, seed=0)
```

Create Random Value with operation 'Boolean'.

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.float(min=0.0, max=1.0, id=0, seed=0)
```

Create Random Value with operation 'Float'.

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.integer(min=0, max=100, id=0, seed=0)
```

Create Random Value with operation 'Integer'.

##### vector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.vector }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RandomValue.vector(min=None, max=None, id=0, seed=0)
```

Create Random Value with operation 'Vector'.

### ReplaceString { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString(string='', find='', replace='')
```

Replace a given string segment with another

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_find](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.i_find) | Input socket: Find |
| [i_replace](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.i_replace) | Input socket: Replace |
| [i_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.i_string) | Input socket: String |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.node) |  |
| [o_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.o_string) | Output socket: String |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ReplaceString.type) |  |

### RotateEuler { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler(
    rotation=None,
    rotate_by=None,
    axis=None,
    angle=0.0,
    *,
    rotation_type='EULER',
    space='OBJECT',
)
```

Apply a secondary Euler rotation to a given Euler rotation

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_angle](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.i_angle) | Input socket: Angle |
| [i_axis](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.i_axis) | Input socket: Axis |
| [i_rotate_by](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.i_rotate_by) | Input socket: Rotate By |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.node) |  |
| [o_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.o_rotation) | Output socket: Rotation |
| [rotation_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.rotation_type) |  |
| [space](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.space) |  |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateEuler.type) |  |

### RotateRotation { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation(
    rotation=None,
    rotate_by=None,
    *,
    rotation_space='GLOBAL',
)
```

Apply a secondary rotation to a given rotation value

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_rotate_by](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.i_rotate_by) | Input socket: Rotate By |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.node) |  |
| [o_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.o_rotation) | Output socket: Rotation |
| [rotation_space](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.rotation_space) |  |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateRotation.type) |  |

### RotateVector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector(vector=None, rotation=None)
```

Apply a rotation to a given vector

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [i_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.i_vector) | Input socket: Vector |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.node) |  |
| [o_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.o_vector) | Output socket: Vector |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotateVector.type) |  |

### RotationToAxisAngle { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle(rotation=None)
```

Convert a rotation to axis angle components

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.node) |  |
| [o_angle](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.o_angle) | Output socket: Angle |
| [o_axis](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.o_axis) | Output socket: Axis |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToAxisAngle.type) |  |

### RotationToEuler { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler(rotation=None)
```

Convert a standard rotation value to an Euler rotation

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler.node) |  |
| [o_euler](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler.o_euler) | Output socket: Euler |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToEuler.type) |  |

### RotationToQuaternion { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion(rotation=None)
```

Retrieve the quaternion components representing a rotation

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.i_rotation) | Input socket: Rotation |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.node) |  |
| [o_w](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.o_w) | Output socket: W |
| [o_x](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.o_x) | Output socket: X |
| [o_y](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.o_y) | Output socket: Y |
| [o_z](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.o_z) | Output socket: Z |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.RotationToQuaternion.type) |  |

### SeparateBundle { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle(bundle=None, *, define_signature=False)
```

Split a bundle into multiple sockets.

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [define_signature](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle.define_signature) |  |
| [i_bundle](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle.i_bundle) | Input socket: Bundle |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle.node) |  |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateBundle.type) |  |

### SeparateColor { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor(color=None, *, mode='RGB')
```

Split a color into separate channels, based on a particular color model

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.i_color) | Input socket: Color |
| [mode](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.mode) |  |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.node) |  |
| [o_alpha](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.o_alpha) | Output socket: Alpha |
| [o_blue](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.o_blue) | Output socket: Blue |
| [o_green](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.o_green) | Output socket: Green |
| [o_red](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.o_red) | Output socket: Red |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateColor.type) |  |

### SeparateMatrix { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix(matrix=None)
```

Split a 4x4 matrix into its individual values

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.i_matrix) | Input socket: Matrix |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.node) |  |
| [o_column_1_row_1](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_1_row_1) | Output socket: Column 1 Row 1 |
| [o_column_1_row_2](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_1_row_2) | Output socket: Column 1 Row 2 |
| [o_column_1_row_3](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_1_row_3) | Output socket: Column 1 Row 3 |
| [o_column_1_row_4](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_1_row_4) | Output socket: Column 1 Row 4 |
| [o_column_2_row_1](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_2_row_1) | Output socket: Column 2 Row 1 |
| [o_column_2_row_2](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_2_row_2) | Output socket: Column 2 Row 2 |
| [o_column_2_row_3](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_2_row_3) | Output socket: Column 2 Row 3 |
| [o_column_2_row_4](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_2_row_4) | Output socket: Column 2 Row 4 |
| [o_column_3_row_1](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_3_row_1) | Output socket: Column 3 Row 1 |
| [o_column_3_row_2](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_3_row_2) | Output socket: Column 3 Row 2 |
| [o_column_3_row_3](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_3_row_3) | Output socket: Column 3 Row 3 |
| [o_column_3_row_4](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_3_row_4) | Output socket: Column 3 Row 4 |
| [o_column_4_row_1](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_4_row_1) | Output socket: Column 4 Row 1 |
| [o_column_4_row_2](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_4_row_2) | Output socket: Column 4 Row 2 |
| [o_column_4_row_3](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_4_row_3) | Output socket: Column 4 Row 3 |
| [o_column_4_row_4](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.o_column_4_row_4) | Output socket: Column 4 Row 4 |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateMatrix.type) |  |

### SeparateTransform { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform(transform=None)
```

Split a transformation matrix into a translation vector, a rotation, and a scale vector

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_transform](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.i_transform) | Input socket: Transform |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.node) |  |
| [o_rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.o_rotation) | Output socket: Rotation |
| [o_scale](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.o_scale) | Output socket: Scale |
| [o_translation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.o_translation) | Output socket: Translation |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateTransform.type) |  |

### SeparateXYZ { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ(vector=None)
```

Split a vector into its X, Y, and Z components

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.i_vector) | Input socket: Vector |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.node) |  |
| [o_x](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.o_x) | Output socket: X |
| [o_y](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.o_y) | Output socket: Y |
| [o_z](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.o_z) | Output socket: Z |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SeparateXYZ.type) |  |

### SliceString { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString(string='', position=0, length=10)
```

Extract a string segment from a larger string

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_length](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.i_length) | Input socket: Length |
| [i_position](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.i_position) | Input socket: Position |
| [i_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.i_string) | Input socket: String |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.node) |  |
| [o_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.o_string) | Output socket: String |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.SliceString.type) |  |

### StringLength { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength(string='')
```

Output the number of characters in the given string

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength.i_string) | Input socket: String |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength.node) |  |
| [o_length](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength.o_length) | Output socket: Length |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringLength.type) |  |

### StringToValue { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue(string='', *, data_type='FLOAT')
```

Derive a numeric value from a given string representation

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.data_type) |  |
| [i_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.i_string) | Input socket: String |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.node) |  |
| [o_length](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.o_length) | Output socket: Length |
| [o_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.o_value) | Output socket: Value |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.float) | Create String to Value with operation 'Float'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.integer) | Create String to Value with operation 'Integer'. |

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.float(string='')
```

Create String to Value with operation 'Float'.

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.StringToValue.integer(string='')
```

Create String to Value with operation 'Integer'.

### Switch { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch(
    switch=False,
    false=None,
    true=None,
    *,
    input_type='GEOMETRY',
)
```

Switch between two inputs

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_false](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.i_false) | Input socket: False |
| [i_switch](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.i_switch) | Input socket: Switch |
| [i_true](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.i_true) | Input socket: True |
| [input_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.input_type) |  |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.node) |  |
| [o_output](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.o_output) | Output socket: Output |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [boolean](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.boolean) | Create Switch with operation 'Boolean'. |
| [bundle](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.bundle) | Create Switch with operation 'Bundle'. |
| [closure](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.closure) | Create Switch with operation 'Closure'. |
| [collection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.collection) | Create Switch with operation 'Collection'. |
| [color](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.color) | Create Switch with operation 'Color'. |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.float) | Create Switch with operation 'Float'. |
| [geometry](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.geometry) | Create Switch with operation 'Geometry'. |
| [image](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.image) | Create Switch with operation 'Image'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.integer) | Create Switch with operation 'Integer'. |
| [material](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.material) | Create Switch with operation 'Material'. |
| [matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.matrix) | Create Switch with operation 'Matrix'. |
| [menu](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.menu) | Create Switch with operation 'Menu'. |
| [object](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.object) | Create Switch with operation 'Object'. |
| [rotation](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.rotation) | Create Switch with operation 'Rotation'. |
| [string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.string) | Create Switch with operation 'String'. |
| [vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.vector) | Create Switch with operation 'Vector'. |

##### boolean { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.boolean }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.boolean(switch=False, false=False, true=False)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Boolean'.

##### bundle { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.bundle }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.bundle(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Bundle'.

##### closure { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.closure }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.closure(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Closure'.

##### collection { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.collection }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.collection(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Collection'.

##### color { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.color }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.color(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Color'.

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.float(switch=False, false=0.0, true=0.0)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Float'.

##### geometry { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.geometry }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.geometry(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Geometry'.

##### image { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.image }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.image(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Image'.

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.integer(switch=False, false=0, true=0)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Integer'.

##### material { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.material }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.material(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Material'.

##### matrix { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.matrix }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.matrix(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Matrix'.

##### menu { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.menu }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.menu(switch=False, false='', true='')
```

Create Switch with operation 'Menu'.

##### object { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.object }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.object(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Object'.

##### rotation { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.rotation }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.rotation(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Rotation'.

##### string { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.string }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.string(switch=False, false='', true='')
```

Create Switch with operation 'String'.

##### vector { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.vector }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.Switch.vector(switch=False, false=None, true=None)
```

Create Switch with operation 'Vector'.

### TransformDirection { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection(direction=None, transform=None)
```

Apply a transformation matrix (excluding translation) to the given vector

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_direction](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.i_direction) | Input socket: Direction |
| [i_transform](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.i_transform) | Input socket: Transform |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.node) |  |
| [o_direction](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.o_direction) | Output socket: Direction |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformDirection.type) |  |

### TransformPoint { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint(vector=None, transform=None)
```

Apply a transformation matrix to the given vector

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_transform](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.i_transform) | Input socket: Transform |
| [i_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.i_vector) | Input socket: Vector |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.node) |  |
| [o_vector](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.o_vector) | Output socket: Vector |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransformPoint.type) |  |

### TransposeMatrix { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix(matrix=None)
```

Flip a matrix over its diagonal, turning columns into rows and vice-versa

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix.i_matrix) | Input socket: Matrix |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix.node) |  |
| [o_matrix](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix.o_matrix) | Output socket: Matrix |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.TransposeMatrix.type) |  |

### UVUnwrap { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap(
    selection=True,
    seam=False,
    margin=0.001,
    fill_holes=True,
    method='Angle Based',
)
```

Generate a UV map based on seam edges

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [i_fill_holes](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.i_fill_holes) | Input socket: Fill Holes |
| [i_margin](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.i_margin) | Input socket: Margin |
| [i_method](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.i_method) | Input socket: Method |
| [i_seam](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.i_seam) | Input socket: Seam |
| [i_selection](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.i_selection) | Input socket: Selection |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.node) |  |
| [o_uv](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.o_uv) | Output socket: UV |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.UVUnwrap.type) |  |

### ValueToString { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString(
    value=0.0,
    decimals=0,
    *,
    data_type='FLOAT',
)
```

Generate a string representation of the given input value

#### Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [data_type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.data_type) |  |
| [i_decimals](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.i_decimals) | Input socket: Decimals |
| [i_value](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.i_value) | Input socket: Value |
| [name](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.name) |  |
| [node](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.node) |  |
| [o_string](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.o_string) | Output socket: String |
| [tree](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.tree) |  |
| [type](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.type) |  |

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [float](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.float) | Create Value to String with operation 'Float'. |
| [integer](#nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.integer) | Create Value to String with operation 'Integer'. |

##### float { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.float }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.float(value=0.0, decimals=0)
```

Create Value to String with operation 'Float'.

##### integer { #nodebpy.nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.integer }

```python
nodes.geometry.converter.ValueToString.integer(value=0)
```

Create Value to String with operation 'Integer'.
